# Salmen Khelifi

> Salmen Khelifi is a full-stack, mobile, DevOps, automation, and AI freelancer with 5+ years of experience and a 4.9★ rating on Freelancer.com across 8 reviews.

## Services

- Full-stack web apps with React, Next.js, Node.js, Express, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB.
- Cross-platform mobile apps with Flutter and Firebase-backed workflows.
- DevOps and infrastructure work with Docker, Linux/Ubuntu, CI/CD, Netlify, and Cloudflare.
- Automation engineering with n8n, Make.com, Google APIs, webhooks, and business process design.
- AI integration with OpenAI, Gemini, Vapi voice AI, OCR, speech, and on-device ML.
- WordPress, WooCommerce, and e-commerce delivery for product-led businesses.

## Selected Projects

- [GrammarAI](https://khelifi-salmen.com/projects/grammarai): A privacy-first, cross-platform grammar editor with on-device AI for free users and cloud-powered premium features.
- [Adaptifit](https://khelifi-salmen.com/projects/adaptifit): An AI-powered fitness and nutrition coach with personalized workout plans, meal tracking, and progress analytics.
- [Anlingo](https://khelifi-salmen.com/projects/anlingo): A privacy-first AI writing assistant with a public landing site, web editor, Express API, billing, usage limits, and a Flutter mobile companion.
- [ChakTech Platform](https://khelifi-salmen.com/projects/chaktech): A production e-commerce platform for Tunisia with a localized storefront, admin back-office, and tenant-scoped API.
- [Noxivo](https://khelifi-salmen.com/projects/noxivo): A WhatsApp-first automation SaaS for agencies with a waitlist, agency dashboard, developer docs, and Fastify workflow engine.
- [LEYEL Modest Fashion](https://khelifi-salmen.com/projects/leyel): A storefront and brand presentation for a modest ready-to-wear fashion label focused on simplicity, quality, and durable style.
- [AI-Powered Workflow Automation](https://khelifi-salmen.com/projects/ai-workflow-automation): An n8n automation hub connecting Gmail, Google APIs, OpenAI, Google Sheets, Google Voice, and WhatsApp into structured task workflows.
- [HTI.tn Electronic E-commerce](https://khelifi-salmen.com/projects/hti-ecommerce): A WordPress and WooCommerce electronics storefront with product browsing, payments, SEO structure, and performance-focused customization.
- [Chab-ka Concept Store](https://khelifi-salmen.com/projects/chab-ka): A concept-store website for handcrafted artisanal products with product showcase, responsive browsing, and SEO-friendly presentation.
- [Velyssa Fashion E-commerce](https://khelifi-salmen.com/projects/velyssa): A WordPress and WooCommerce fashion storefront with categories, product pages, checkout, AWS services, Brevo, and SEO.
- [blog-sainteagnes.fr](https://khelifi-salmen.com/projects/sainteagnes-blog): A modern blog platform with responsive design, SEO optimization, performance, security, and CMS-friendly content management.
- [DigiTrends.dev](https://khelifi-salmen.com/projects/digitrends-dev): A responsive company website for software development, cloud solutions, DevOps, and digital transformation.
- [Electronic E-Commerce Website](https://khelifi-salmen.com/projects/electronic-ecommerce): A WordPress electronics store with Proto theme layouts, product listings, search, filtering, and e-commerce functionality.
- [digitrends.pro](https://khelifi-salmen.com/projects/digitrends-pro): A French-language business website presenting operational excellence and digital innovation as connected transformation services.
- [rentiora.com](https://khelifi-salmen.com/projects/rentiora): A car-rental platform concept for browsing premium vehicles such as sedans, coupes, SUVs, and convertibles.
